name: Israeli Strikes on Iran — February 28, 2026
description: On 28 February 2026, combined US-Israel precision airstrikes targeted Iran's military and security leadership in Tehran and other locations. The strikes killed [Mohammad Pakpour](/people/mohammad-pakpour) (IRGC Commander-in-Chief), [Abdolrahim Mousavi](/people/abdolrahim-mousavi) (Chief of the General Staff), [Hossein Jabal Amelian](/people/hossein-jabal-amelian) (head of SPND), and [Reza Mozaffari Nia](/people/reza-mozaffari-nia) (former SPND head). Also killed in the February 28 strikes were intelligence and military office figures: [Saleh Asadi](/people/saleh-asadi) (Deputy Head of Armed Forces Intelligence), [Mohammad Shirazi](/people/mohammad-shirazi-military) (Head of the Supreme Leader's Military Office), [Akbar Ebrahimzadeh](/people/akbar-ebrahimzadeh) (Deputy Head of the Supreme Leader's Military Office), [Mohammad Baseri](/people/mohammad-baseri) (senior MOIS official), and [Yahya Hosseini Panjaki](/people/yahya-hosseini-panjaki) (Deputy Minister of Intelligence for Israel Affairs). [Ali Khamenei](/people/ali-khamenei) was also killed on the same day, triggering a succession crisis within the Islamic Republic. The February 28 strikes represented the most devastating decapitation of Iran's military, intelligence, and nuclear leadership since Operation Rising Lion in June 2025.
editorial_notes: Feb 28 2026 strikes killed Pakpour, Mousavi, Jabal Amelian, Mozaffari Nia, and Khamenei. Triggered succession crisis.
